title: Chat Calc
description: The *fastest* calculator around; built right into your chat; just type in and you'll see your answer!
body:
This is a port of [ChatCalc](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-calc) by RTTV (which is also a port of [ChatCalc](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chatcalc) by Kokeria) to the newest minecraft versions, because it hasn't been updated in a long time. It's also completely converted from Java to Kotlin, just because I can.

The functionality hasn't changed much, so you can check the [original mod's description](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-calc). There is, however, an additional dependency - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - which is needed for Kotlin to work.

I do plan on adding some features later, such as better config handling and allowing calculations in text fields other than chat, like ~~signs~~ (done), books, anvils etc. They aren't available yet, though. If there's anything else that you want to see in the mod, [please create an issue on github](https://github.com/Emirlol/chatcalc/issues).

-------
